## How does it expose source info in development?

<!--
This is most of the work — if you know any of these, please share:

- A DOM property on rendered elements (like React's __reactFiber$, Vue's
  __vueParentComponent, Svelte's __svelte_meta)
- A data attribute added in dev (like Astro's data-astro-source-file)
- Component objects that carry a source file path
- A dev-server endpoint to resolve source maps or launch the editor
  (like /__nextjs_launch-editor or /__open-in-editor)

If you don't know, that's fine too — leave this empty.
-->
